nodes.x: A Song of degrees. Unto thee lift I up mine eyes, O thou that dwellest in the heavens.

or my brethren and companions’ Bika I will now say, Peace be within thee. é 9 Because of the house of the Lord our God I will seek thy good. .. PSALM CXXMII. Prayer for mercy. A Song of degrees... ..... Ue thee lift I up mine eyes, () thou that dwellest in the heavens.
Behold, as the eyes of servants [look] unto the hand of their masters, [and] as the eyes of a maiden unto the hand of her mistress; so our eyes [wait] upon the LORD our God, until that he have mercy…
Have mercy upon us, O LORD, have mercy upon us: for we are exceedingly filled with contempt.
Our soul is exceedingly filled with the scorning of those that are at ease, [and] with the contempt of the proud.
